message:
fix: use byte estimation for large files during scan (fixes #3)

js-tiktoken has severe performance issues with larger files:
- 10KB: ~8 seconds
- 50KB: ~2+ minutes

This caused scanning to hang indefinitely on projects with
moderately-sized files.

Fix: Add MAX_SCAN_TOKEN_BYTES (2KB) threshold. Files larger
than this use fast byte-based estimation (~4 bytes/token)
during scan. Accurate tiktoken counting still used for small
files.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
